description: Fixed textiles method definitions for SSA (planning + sessions). Includes fiber preparation, mending, sewing, weaving/knitting/crochet, dyeing, and garment care. Designed for SessionBlueprintBuilder to create runnable steps with timers, cues, and resource lists. Cultural techniques are presented as opt-in variants without stereotyping.

notes: Methods describe repeatable workflows (not patterns of consumption).
Safety: dyes/chemicals/tools require PPE and ventilation. Users can override via layer_overrides.

general: Use adequate lighting and ergonomic posture to reduce strain.
Keep blades covered; store needles/pins in a container.
Ventilate when using dyes, solvents, or spray adhesives.
heat: Use caution with irons/steam; keep away from children and cords clear of walk paths.

methods.name: Laundry Sort + Care Plan
methods.summary: Create a simple sorting system and care plan to reduce rewash, fading, and fabric damage.

defaultSteps.title: Define sort bins
defaultSteps.action: Pick bins: lights/darks/towels/delicates (adjust to your household).

defaultSteps.title: Set care rules
defaultSteps.action: Set default water temp and drying rules per bin.

defaultSteps.title: Stain triage
defaultSteps.action: Create a quick stain triage step: treat now vs soak later vs professional.

doneLooksLike: Sort system exists; fewer rewashes and damaged items.
qualityChecks: Delicates and dyed items protected with mesh/low heat.
commonMistakes: Overloading washer; mixing towels with lint-sensitive fabrics.

methods.name: Set Up a Basic Mending Kit
methods.summary: Assemble a small kit so repairs happen quickly (buttons, hems, small tears).

defaultSteps.title: Choose kit container
defaultSteps.action: Pick a container and a home location (reachable).

defaultSteps.title: Stock essentials
defaultSteps.action: Add needles, thread colors, scissors, seam ripper, pins/clips, tape.

defaultSteps.title: Add common replacements
defaultSteps.action: Add spare buttons and patches matching household wardrobes.

doneLooksLike: Kit stocked and easy to find.

methods.name: Replace a Button (Hand Sew)
methods.summary: Securely replace a button using a shank (if needed) and locking stitches.

defaultSteps.title: Match button + thread
defaultSteps.action: Choose a matching button and strong thread.

defaultSteps.title: Anchor thread
defaultSteps.action: Double thread, knot, and anchor from the inside.
cues: Use small tight stitches on the inside.

defaultSteps.title: Sew button
defaultSteps.action: Stitch through holes 6–10 times; create a small shank if fabric is thick.
cues: Do not over-tighten; allow fabric movement.

defaultSteps.title: Lock + finish
defaultSteps.action: Wrap thread under button 3–5 times, then knot inside.

qualityChecks: Stitch path repeats consistently; knot secure.

methods.name: Fix a Hem (Hand Stitch)
methods.summary: Repair or re-hem using a blind stitch or simple running stitch depending on garment.

defaultSteps.title: Press hem
defaultSteps.action: Press fold to desired length; pin/clip.

defaultSteps.title: Stitch
defaultSteps.action: Use blind stitch for dress pants/skirts; running stitch for casual wear.

defaultSteps.title: Finish
defaultSteps.action: Knot, trim, press again.

qualityChecks: Stitches not visible from outside (if blind).

methods.name: Sew a Basic Machine Seam
methods.summary: Sew a straight seam with seam allowance, backstitching, and pressing.

defaultSteps.title: Prep
defaultSteps.action: Choose needle type, set stitch length, and test on scrap.

defaultSteps.title: Align + pin
defaultSteps.action: Align fabric edges; pin/clip within seam allowance.

defaultSteps.title: Sew seam
defaultSteps.action: Sew with backstitch at start/end.

defaultSteps.title: Press
defaultSteps.action: Press seam flat, then press open/to one side.

doneLooksLike: Seam is straight with consistent allowance.

methods.name: Basic Warp Setup (Loom)
methods.summary: Plan and set up a basic warp with even tension and secure tie-on.

defaultSteps.title: Plan warp
defaultSteps.action: Set width, length, ends-per-inch target, and yarn choice.

defaultSteps.title: Wind warp
defaultSteps.action: Wind warp with counting; keep cross intact.
cues: Count carefully; use markers every 10–20 ends.

defaultSteps.title: Dress loom
defaultSteps.action: Beam warp, thread heddles/reed, and tie on evenly.

defaultSteps.title: Tension check
defaultSteps.action: Check for even tension; adjust before weaving.

methods.name: Basic Cast-On + Gauge Check (Knitting)
methods.summary: Cast on and knit a small swatch to confirm gauge before a project.

defaultSteps.title: Cast on
defaultSteps.action: Cast on enough stitches for a swatch (e.g., 30).

defaultSteps.title: Knit swatch
defaultSteps.action: Knit 4–6 inches in pattern stitch.

defaultSteps.title: Measure gauge
defaultSteps.action: Measure stitches/rows per 4 inches; adjust needle size if needed.

qualityChecks: Swatch washed/dried if garment will be washed.

methods.name: Natural Dye Bath (Bundle Basics)
methods.summary: Prepare a small natural dye bath with safe handling and recordkeeping for repeatability.

defaultSteps.title: Safety + setup
defaultSteps.action: Ventilate, protect surfaces, and prep a dedicated pot.

defaultSteps.title: Scour fabric
defaultSteps.action: Wash/scour fabric so dye takes evenly.

defaultSteps.title: Prepare dye bath
defaultSteps.action: Simmer dye material; strain if needed.
cues: Keep below rolling boil unless method specifies.

defaultSteps.title: Dye + record
defaultSteps.action: Dye fabric and record recipe/time/temp for repeatability.

notes: Indigo requires specialized chemistry; follow a trusted process and record carefully.
addSafety: Avoid inhaling powders; use dedicated tools.

methods.name: Repair-First Capsule Plan
methods.summary: Plan a repair-first capsule wardrobe refresh: mend, alter, and prioritize durable pieces before buying.

defaultSteps.title: Inventory garments
defaultSteps.action: List key garments and condition (good/repair/replace).

defaultSteps.title: Prioritize repairs
defaultSteps.action: Pick top 3 repairs that unlock multiple outfits.

defaultSteps.title: Set purchase guardrails
defaultSteps.action: Set budget and quality constraints for any replacement items.
